title: Linear Algebra
description: Understand vectors and matrices and their applications in computer science.

title: Probability and Statistics
description: Apply probability theory and statistical inference to model uncertainty.

title: Graph Theory
description: Represent and analyse graphs, implement BFS and DFS, and solve shortest-path problems.

title: Lambda Calculus
description: Understand alpha-equivalence, beta-reduction, and Church encodings.

title: Logic and Proof Techniques
description: Construct formal proofs using propositional logic, induction, and proof by contradiction.

title: Compiler Design
description: Implement lexers, parsers, and code generators; understand IR and optimisation.

title: Memory Management
description: Manage heap and stack allocation, understand garbage collection and ownership.

title: Design Patterns
description: Apply creational and structural design patterns to build maintainable software.

title: API Design
description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs with versioning, pagination, and error handling.

title: Distributed Systems
description: Reason about CAP theorem, implement consensus protocols and distributed stores.
